text:
Release date: 6 Feb 2018
Fixes for the following security vulnerabilities:
    CVE-2018-2562
    CVE-2018-2622
    CVE-2018-2640
    CVE-2018-2665
    CVE-2018-2668
    CVE-2018-2612


Relase notes: https://mariadb.com/kb/en/library/mariadb-10131-release-notes/
